data.body: PASS 1 review (criterion T8 — LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay): NOT APPLICABLE / PASS. This plan defines a verified-fake contract-testing harness for the Jira `AcliClient` (a subprocess/REST client) — it contains no LLM/agent system: no prompts, sub-agents, reviewers, LLM output schemas, or enum value-vocabularies. The "shape-contract" assertions are about JSON primitive types and key presence on Jira REST payloads, not an LLM output schema. The overlay's probe targets (undefined-but-referenced enum vocabulary, decision-rule co-location, ambiguous counter placement, sub-step fallbacks, instruction-locality/pink-elephant antipatterns) have no surface here. Tool-verified the referenced surface exists and is fully specified (tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/_fakes.py:30 `FakeAcliClient` with the four enrichment methods get_comment_map/get_issuelinks_map/get_parent_map/search_issues). No T8 findings.
